title: micromeria varia f. rupestris
intro: Micromeria varia f. rupestris, also known as Rock Thyme, is a plant species within the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential health benefits in reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rock Thyme is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
